title: The next phase of enterprise AI
summary: OpenAI outlines the next phase of enterprise AI, as adoption accelerates across industries with Frontier, ChatGPT Enterprise, Codex, and company-wide AI agents.

title: Introducing the Child Safety Blueprint
summary: Discover OpenAI’s Child Safety Blueprint—a roadmap for building AI responsibly with safeguards, age-appropriate design, and collaboration to protect and empower young people online.

title: Improving the academic workflow: Introducing two AI agents for better figures and peer review
summary: Generative AI

title: Customize Amazon Nova models with Amazon Bedrock fine-tuning
summary: In this post, we'll walk you through a complete implementation of model fine-tuning in Amazon Bedrock using Amazon Nova models, demonstrating each step through an intent classifier example that achieves superior performance on a domain specific task. Throughout this guide, you'll learn to prepare high-quality training data that drives meaningful model improvements, configure hyperparameters to optimize learning without overfitting, and deploy your fine-tuned model for improved accuracy and reduced latency. We'll show you how to evaluate your results using training metrics and loss curves.

title: Human-in-the-loop constructs for agentic workflows in healthcare and life sciences
summary: In healthcare and life sciences, AI agents help organizations process clinical data, submit regulatory filings, automate medical coding, and accelerate drug development and commercialization. However, the sensitive nature of healthcare data and regulatory requirements like Good Practice (GxP) compliance require human oversight at key decision points. This is where human-in-the-loop (HITL) constructs become essential. In this post, you will learn four practical approaches to implementing human-in-the-loop constructs using AWS services.

title: Building intelligent audio search with Amazon Nova Embeddings: A deep dive into semantic audio understanding
summary: This post walks you through understanding audio embeddings, implementing Amazon Nova Multimodal Embeddings, and building a practical search system for your audio content. You'll learn how embeddings represent audio as vectors, explore the technical capabilities of Amazon Nova, and see hands-on code examples for indexing and querying your audio libraries. By the end, you'll have the knowledge to deploy production-ready audio search capabilities.

title: Reinforcement fine-tuning on Amazon Bedrock: Best practices
summary: In this post, we explore where RFT is most effective, using the GSM8K mathematical reasoning dataset as a concrete example. We then walk through best practices for dataset preparation and reward function design, show how to monitor training progress using Amazon Bedrock metrics, and conclude with practical hyperparameter tuning guidelines informed by experiments across multiple models and use cases.

title: Manage AI costs with Amazon Bedrock Projects
summary: With Amazon Bedrock Projects, you can attribute inference costs to specific workloads and analyze them in AWS Cost Explorer and AWS Data Exports. In this post, you will learn how to set up Projects end-to-end, from designing a tagging strategy to analyzing costs.

title: Introducing Brand Studio: The creative production platform powered by your brand
summary: We’re excited to introduce Brand Studio by Stability AI, the end-to-end creative production platform powered by your brand.

title: Stability AI Joins the Tech Coalition
summary: We’re pleased to share that Stability AI has joined the Tech Coalition, a global alliance of leading technology companies working together to combat online child sexual exploitation and abuse.

title: Warner Music Group and Stability AI Join Forces To Build The Next Generation Of Responsible AI Tools For Music Creation
summary: Warner Music Group and Stability AI today announced a collaborative effort to advance the use of responsible AI in music creation, combining WMG’s long-standing advocacy for principled innovation with Stability AI’s expertise and leadership in commercially-safe generative audio.

title: Universal Music Group and Stability AI Announce Strategic Alliance to Co-Develop Professional AI Music Creation Tools
summary: Universal Music Group and Stability AI today announced a strategic alliance to develop next-generation professional music creation tools, powered by responsibly trained generative AI and built to support the creative process of artists, producers and songwriters globally.

title: Stability AI and EA Partner to Empower Artists, Designers, and Developers to Reimagine Game Development
summary: Stability AI and Electronic Arts (EA) have formed a strategic partnership to co-develop transformative generative AI models, tools, and workflows that empower EA’s artists, designers, and developers to reimagine how games are made.

title: Stability AI Brings Image Services to Amazon Bedrock, Delivering End-to-End Creative Control with Enterprise-Grade Infrastructure
summary: Today, we're excited to announce we’re expanding our partnership with Amazon Web Services to bring our Stable Image Services to Amazon Bedrock.

title: Stability AI’s Annual Integrity Transparency Report
summary: At Stability AI, we are committed to building and deploying generative AI responsibly, and we believe that transparency is foundational to safe and ethical AI.

title: Stability AI Introduces Stable Audio 2.5, the First Audio Model Built for Enterprise Sound Production at Scale
summary: We’re excited to release Stable Audio 2.5, our latest audio model and the first developed for enterprise-grade use cases. Stable Audio 2.5 introduces advancements in quality and control that address the demand for dynamic compositions that can be adapted for custom brand needs.

title: BidirLM: Turning Generative LLMs into the Best Open-Source Omnimodal Encoders
Darwin V6: Diagnostic-Guided Evolutionary Model Merging
AWS and Cerebras Collaboration Sets a New Standard for AI Inference Speed and Performance in the Cloud >
summary: Products

title: Context Caching is Available 2024/08/02
summary: Both deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner have been upgraded to DeepSeek-V3.2.

title: New API Features 2024/07/25
summary: Both deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner have been upgraded to DeepSeek-V3.2.

title: AutoClaw launch
summary: Zhipu AI introduced AutoClaw, a product positioned as a fast way to equip computers with its AI agent capabilities in about one minute. It is presented as a named product on the homepage alongside the company’s core offerings.

title: GLM-5-Turbo announced
summary: Zhipu AI announced GLM-5-Turbo as a base model optimized for agent scenarios, with deep training-level improvements to tool use and long-horizon task execution. The company positions it as part of its new-generation full-stack large model system.

title: GLM-5 flagship model release
summary: Zhipu AI launched GLM-5 as a new flagship foundation model for agent engineering, highlighting open-source SOTA performance in coding and agent capabilities. The page also claims strong benchmark results on SWE-bench Verified and Terminal Bench 2.0.

title: GLM-4.6V open-source vision reasoning model
summary: Zhipu AI announced GLM-4.6V, an open-source visual reasoning model with strong performance at the 100B-class level. It is described as supporting tool calling natively, automatic task completion, and 128K long context.

title: AutoGLM agent model release
summary: Zhipu AI released AutoGLM, an agent model with autonomous planning, reasoning, and execution capabilities. The company says it addresses task planning, data scarcity, and policy optimization challenges while enabling continuous self-improvement.

title: GLM-OS concept and Agent products unveiled
summary: On November 29, Zhipu AI formally proposed the GLM-OS concept and released two agent products: AutoGLM and GLM-PC. This marked a broader push to build out the large-model agent ecosystem.

title: CogAgent-9B open sourced as GLM-PC base model
summary: Zhipu AI open sourced CogAgent-9B, the base model behind GLM-PC, to support further community development of agent ecosystems. The model, CogAgent-9B-20241220, is described as a specialized agent-task model trained from GLM-4V-9B and using only screenshots as input.

title: Agent OpenDay updates: AutoGLM and GLM-PC progress
summary: At its Agent OpenDay, Zhipu AI shared new agent progress including AutoGLM performing more than 50-step autonomous operations and working across apps. The company also said GLM-PC entered internal testing, emphasizing computer-use capabilities based on visual understanding.

title: Introducing Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM, a speech model focused on attentive listening, robust interference suppression, and more natural real-time interaction.

title: Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview Model Release on Arena
summary: ByteDance Seed released the Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview model on Arena, marking a preview availability of the Seed 2.0 model line.

title: Seed 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0, a new foundation model release in its model portfolio.

title: Introducing Seedream 5.0 Lite
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seedream 5.0 Lite, highlighting deeper thinking and more accurate generation as key improvements.

title: Seedance 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seedance 2.0, expanding its lineup of named AI models.

title: Seed Prover 1.5
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed Prover 1.5, a model for advanced mathematical reasoning built on a novel agentic architecture.

title: Official Release of Seed1.8
summary: ByteDance Seed officially released Seed1.8, described as a generalized agentic model.

title: Official Release of Seedance 1.5 pro
summary: ByteDance Seed officially released Seedance 1.5 pro, presented as a combined sound-and-vision model.

title: WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5 announced
summary: 01.AI announced WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5, positioning 2026 as a critical year for enterprise deployment of multi-agent systems. The update is presented as a major platform milestone for enterprise AI adoption.

title: 01.AI launches “Super Employee” enterprise AI agent
summary: 01.AI launched “Super Employee,” an enterprise AI agent aimed at delivering measurable business value. The announcement frames it as a new phase for enterprise AI agents focused on practical business outcomes.

title: 01.AI's LLM One-box Solution Machine receives CAICT top-level certification
summary: 01.AI announced that its LLM One-box Solution Machine received top-level certification from CAICT. This certification highlights external validation of the company’s enterprise AI infrastructure offering.

title: Yi-Lightning open-source MoE model highlighted as global SOTA
summary: 01.AI featured Yi-Lightning as a global state-of-the-art mixture-of-experts large language model and noted it as open-source. The mention positions Yi-Lightning as a flagship model announcement from the company.
